name: Daily launch status
description: Daily during an active launch: pull metrics, flag issues, draft the daily standup.

name: Weekly listing audit
description: Wednesday morning: pick one listing, run a quick audit, save recommendations for the week's optimization sprint.

name: Weekly content batch
description: Sunday evening: process all content briefs in the inbox, produce voice-locked drafts and derivatives for Monday review.

name: Weekly copy review
description: Monday morning: run Bullshit Filter cleaning on any markdown drafts in the inbox, save cleaned versions for review.

name: Monday cashflow
description: Monday morning: parse the bank CSVs in the inbox, output a red/yellow/green status memo.

name: Monthly budget variance
description: Last day of the month: compare actuals to budget, flag overruns, draft a variance memo.

name: Weekly competitor watch
description: Wednesday morning: scan top competitors, flag changes, draft the weekly intel brief.

name: Friday weekly review
description: Friday afternoon: pull weekly metrics, draft the review for Monday standup.

name: Month-end review
description: Last day of the month: pull monthly metrics, draft the monthly business review.

name: Monthly investor update
description: Last day of the month: pull metrics, draft the monthly investor update for founder review.

name: Friday pipeline review
description: Friday afternoon: flag stuck deals, draft quick forensics on the top 3.

name: Weekly support review
description: Friday morning: pull weekly support metrics, SLA compliance check, pattern detection.
